title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Axis Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Axis Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
